sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n66360" key="mesambri/h" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσ-αμβρίη</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσ-αμβρινός</orth>, <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσ-αμέριος</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μεσημ</itype>-. <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">μεσανύκτιον</orth>, <abbr TEIform="abbr">v.</abbr> <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">μεσο</itype>-.</entryFree>
